title: Discovery Interview Sprint
summary: Discovery Interview Sprint helps the team run a practical product workflow with cleaner signal and clearer follow-through.
whenToUseIt: Use discovery interview sprint when the team needs a more deliberate way to review work and decide what happens next.

steps.title: Define the operating question
steps.description: Write down the decision you are trying to make and what would count as a good outcome.

steps.title: Collect the right signal
steps.description: Pull together the data, notes, and stakeholder inputs that make the review real instead of performative.

steps.title: Make the decision
steps.description: Choose the next move, what changes, and what stays the same.

steps.title: Assign follow-through
steps.description: Lock owners, dates, and the next review point so the work does not dissolve after the meeting.

expectedOutcome: A clearer next move in product with named owners and a visible review loop.
commonMistakes: Turning the playbook into a status meeting instead of a decision forum.
Skipping the follow-through details after a good discussion.
Reviewing too much at once instead of focusing on one real operating question.
